metadata.description: AI-powered plugins for Claude Code and Claude Cowork. Marketing automation, content production, analytics, and more.

plugins.name: digital-marketing-pro
plugins.description: Plan, execute, and measure digital marketing across all channels. 25 specialist agents, 7 commands, 118 skills, 14 HTTP connectors, connector discovery and onboarding. All skills with argument-hint autocomplete, 17 execution skills with safety guards, and structured evals.

plugins.name: contentforge
plugins.description: Enterprise content production pipeline with 13 agents, 7 commands, 19 skills, 10 industry knowledge packs, and zero hallucinations. Research, draft with subject matter expertise, annotate visuals, fact-check with domain-specific validation, humanize, publish, translate, and repurpose — with pipeline performance tracking, multi-backend I/O (Google Sheets, Airtable, local), backend migration, auto-generated brand key files, data chart generation, structured internal linking, and structured evals.
